properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp
| filter message = "Request completed"
| stats count() as request_count by bin(1m)
properties.title: API Request Volume (per minute)

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp
| filter level = "error"
| stats count() as error_count by bin(1m)
properties.title: Error Count (per minute)

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, duration
| filter message = "Request completed"
| stats avg(duration) as avg_ms, max(duration) as max_ms, min(duration) as min_ms by bin(5m)
properties.title: Response Time Statistics (5min intervals)

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, statusCode
| filter message = "Request completed"
| stats count() by statusCode
properties.title: HTTP Status Code Distribution

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, path
| filter message = "Request completed"
| stats count() as request_count by path
| sort request_count desc
| limit 10
properties.title: Top 10 API Endpoints

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, level, message, errorCode, path
| filter level = "error"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 20
properties.title: Recent Errors (Last 20)

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields path, duration
| filter message = "Request completed"
| stats avg(duration) as avg_response_time by path
| sort avg_response_time desc
| limit 10
properties.title: Slowest API Endpoints

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields errorCode
| filter level = "error"
| stats count() as error_count by errorCode
| sort error_count desc
properties.title: Error Types Distribution

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, correlationId, path, statusCode, duration, message
| filter message = "Request completed" or level = "error"
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 50
properties.title: Recent Activity (Last 50 requests)

properties.query:
SOURCE '/aws/eks/auth-api'
| fields @timestamp, level, correlationId, method, path, statusCode, duration, message, errorCode, ip
| sort @timestamp desc
| limit 100
properties.title: Interactive Logs - Filter and Search
